title: Contributing to vcf2dosage
text: Fork clone repository Create feature branch Follow tidyverse style guide Test devtools::check() Submit pull request Report bugs via GitHub issue tracker reproducible example.

title: Getting Started with vcf2dosage
text: vcf2dosage converts VCF files numeric dosage matrices ready genomic selection (GS) genome-wide association studies (GWAS). handles diploid polyploid species automatic ploidy detection.

title: Getting Started with vcf2dosage
code: library(vcf2dosage)  # One function does everything result <- vcf2dosage("my_genotypes.vcf.gz") # Step 1: Reading VCF # > Read 15,234 variants x 384 samples # Step 2: Extracting genotype calls # Step 3: Detecting ploidy # > Detected ploidy: 2 # Step 4: Converting to dosage # Step 5: Filtering # > MAF filter (>= 0.05): removed 1,847/15,234 variants # > Missingness filter (<= 20%): removed 312/15,234 variants # Done # > Final: 13,075 variants x 384 samples (ploidy = 2)  # The result contains everything you need dim(result$dosage) # variants x samples dim(result$dosage_t) # samples x markers (for GS) head(result$map) # marker positions

title: Getting Started with vcf2dosage
code: # Tetraploid potato result <- vcf2dosage("potato.vcf.gz", ploidy = 4) # Dosage values: 0, 1, 2, 3, or 4  # Hexaploid wheat result <- vcf2dosage("wheat.vcf.gz", ploidy = 6) # Dosage values: 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, or 6  # Auto-detect ploidy result <- vcf2dosage("unknown.vcf.gz") result$ploidy

title: Getting Started with vcf2dosage
code: result <- vcf2dosage(   "genotypes.vcf.gz",   min_maf = 0.01, # Keep rarer variants   max_missing_variant = 0.1, # Stricter: max 10% missing   max_missing_sample = 0.3 # Remove samples with >30% missing )  # Check what was removed result$filter_summary

title: Getting Started with vcf2dosage
code: # rrBLUP: centered dosage matrix Z <- export_rrblup(result$dosage) # library(rrBLUP) # fit <- mixed.solve(y = pheno$yield, Z = Z)  # GWASpoly: marker info + dosage geno <- export_gwaspoly(result$dosage, result$vcf$fix) # library(GWASpoly) # data <- read.GWASpoly(pheno.file, geno.file)  # BGLR: imputed matrix for Bayesian models X <- export_bglr(result$dosage, impute = TRUE) # library(BGLR) # fit <- BGLR(y = pheno$yield, ETA = list(MRK = list(X = X, model = "BRR")))  # sommer: genomic relationship matrix G <- export_sommer(result$dosage, as_relationship = TRUE) # library(sommer) # fit <- mmer(yield ~ 1, random = ~vsr(genotype, Gu = G), data = pheno)

title: Getting Started with vcf2dosage
text: control, use individual functions:
code: # 1. Read VCF vcf <- read_vcf("genotypes.vcf.gz")  # 2. Extract GT field gt <- extract_gt(vcf)  # 3. Check ploidy ploidy <- detect_ploidy(gt) table(ploidy)  # 4. Convert to dosage dosage <- gt_to_dosage(gt)  # 5. Filter dosage <- filter_maf(dosage, maf = 0.05)$dosage dosage <- filter_missingness(dosage, max_missing = 0.2)$dosage  # 6. Quality summary summary <- variant_summary(dosage, vcf$fix)

what: Polyploid-Aware VCF to Dosage Matrix Conversion for Genomic Selection
title: Polyploid-Aware VCF to Dosage Matrix Conversion for Genomic Selection
text: vcf2dosage converts VCF files numeric dosage matrices genomic selection GWAS. handles diploid polyploid species, filters MAF missingness, exports formats ready rrBLUP, GWASpoly, BGLR, sommer, AGHmatrix.

title: Polyploid-Aware VCF to Dosage Matrix Conversion for Genomic Selection
text: Getting VCF file usable dosage matrix R surprisingly painful, especially polyploids. either cobble together vcfR + manual parsing + custom scripts, use species-specific tools don’t generalize. vcf2dosage one function call.

title: Polyploid-Aware VCF to Dosage Matrix Conversion for Genomic Selection
code: library(vcf2dosage)  # One function does everything result <- vcf2dosage("genotypes.vcf.gz") result #> vcf2dosage Result #> Variants: 12,847 #> Samples:  342 #> Ploidy:   2 #> Chroms:   10  # Use with rrBLUP Z <- export_rrblup(result$dosage) # rrBLUP::mixed.solve(y = pheno$yield, Z = Z)  # Tetraploid potato? Just specify ploidy result <- vcf2dosage("potato.vcf.gz", ploidy = 4)  # Export for GWASpoly geno_df <- export_gwaspoly(result$dosage, result$vcf$fix)

title: Polyploid-Aware VCF to Dosage Matrix Conversion for Genomic Selection
text: VCF tools assume diploid genotypes (0/0, 0/1, 1/1). vcf2dosage handles arbitrary ploidy:
code: # Tetraploid: 0/0/0/0 -> dosage 0, 0/0/1/1 -> dosage 2, 1/1/1/1 -> dosage 4 result <- vcf2dosage("tetraploid.vcf.gz", ploidy = 4)  # Hexaploid wheat result <- vcf2dosage("wheat.vcf.gz", ploidy = 6)  # Auto-detect ploidy from genotype calls result <- vcf2dosage("unknown_ploidy.vcf.gz") result$ploidy

title: Polyploid-Aware VCF to Dosage Matrix Conversion for Genomic Selection
code: result <- vcf2dosage(   "genotypes.vcf.gz",   min_maf = 0.05,              # Remove rare variants   max_missing_variant = 0.2,   # Max 20% missing per variant   max_missing_sample = 0.5     # Max 50% missing per sample )

title: Polyploid-Aware VCF to Dosage Matrix Conversion for Genomic Selection
code: # rrBLUP: centered (-1, 0, 1), samples x markers Z <- export_rrblup(result$dosage)  # GWASpoly: Marker/Chrom/Position + dosage columns geno <- export_gwaspoly(result$dosage, result$vcf$fix)  # BGLR: samples x markers, missing imputed with marker means X <- export_bglr(result$dosage)  # sommer: samples x markers, or genomic relationship matrix G <- export_sommer(result$dosage, as_relationship = TRUE)  # Marker map for any package map <- export_marker_map(result$vcf$fix)

what: Part of the Plant Breeding Toolkit
title: Polyploid-Aware VCF to Dosage Matrix Conversion for Genomic Selection
text: vcf2dosage works alongside: brapiR2 - Pull genotype data BrAPI servers phenoQC - Quality control phenotypic trial data Together: retrieve (brapiR2) -> clean (phenoQC) -> prepare genotypes (vcf2dosage) -> analyze.

what: Create a Minimal Example VCF File — create_example_vcf
title: Create a Minimal Example VCF File — create_example_vcf
text: Writes small VCF file known genotypes testing. Includes diploid, tetraploid, mixed-ploidy examples.

title: Create a Minimal Example VCF File — create_example_vcf
Create a Minimal Example VCF File — create_example_vcf
text: file Character. Path write VCF file. type Character. Type example: "diploid", "tetraploid", "mixed". Default "diploid". n_variants Integer. Number variants. Default 10. n_samples Integer. Number samples. Default 5.

title: Create a Minimal Example VCF File — create_example_vcf
text: file path (invisibly).

title: Create a Minimal Example VCF File — create_example_vcf
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".vcf") create_example_vcf(tmp, type = "diploid") vcf <- read_vcf(tmp) } # }

what: Detect Ploidy from Genotype Calls — detect_ploidy
title: Detect Ploidy from Genotype Calls — detect_ploidy
text: Examines genotype matrix determine ploidy level sample based number alleles per genotype call.

title: Detect Ploidy from Genotype Calls — detect_ploidy
Detect Ploidy from Genotype Calls — detect_ploidy
text: gt_matrix character matrix genotype calls (variants x samples).

title: Detect Ploidy from Genotype Calls — detect_ploidy
text: named integer vector ploidy per sample. Returns common ploidy observed across non-missing genotypes.

title: Detect Ploidy from Genotype Calls — detect_ploidy
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ vcf <- read_vcf("tetraploid.vcf.gz") gt <- extract_gt(vcf) detect_ploidy(gt) # sample1 sample2 sample3 #       4       4       4 } # }

what: Export Dosage Matrix for BGLR — export_bglr
title: Export Dosage Matrix for BGLR — export_bglr
text: Exports dosage matrix format expected BGLR::BGLR(): numeric matrix samples rows markers columns. Missing values imputed column means (BGLR requires complete data).

title: Export Dosage Matrix for BGLR — export_bglr
Export Dosage Matrix for BGLR — export_bglr
text: dosage Numeric matrix. Dosage matrix (variants x samples). impute Logical. Whether impute missing values marker means. Default TRUE. file Character NULL. provided, writes CSV file.

title: Export Dosage Matrix for BGLR — export_bglr
text: numeric matrix (samples x markers).

what: Export Dosage Matrix for GWASpoly — export_gwaspoly
title: Export Dosage Matrix for GWASpoly — export_gwaspoly
text: Exports dosage matrix format expected GWASpoly::read.GWASpoly(): data frame columns marker info (Marker, Chrom, Position) followed one column per sample containing integer dosage values.

title: Export Dosage Matrix for GWASpoly — export_gwaspoly
Export Dosage Matrix for GWASpoly — export_gwaspoly
text: dosage Numeric matrix. Dosage matrix (variants x samples). variant_info Tibble. Variant information least CHROM POS columns (vcf$fix). file Character NULL. provided, writes CSV file.

title: Export Dosage Matrix for GWASpoly — export_gwaspoly
text: data frame GWASpoly format. Returned invisibly file provided.

title: Export Marker Map — export_marker_map
text: Exports marker map tibble columns marker name, chromosome, position — compatible GS GWAS packages.

title: Export Marker Map — export_marker_map
Export Marker Map — export_marker_map
text: variant_info Tibble. Variant information vcf$fix. file Character NULL. provided, writes CSV file.

title: Export Marker Map — export_marker_map
text: tibble columns: marker, chrom, pos.

what: Export Dosage Matrix for rrBLUP — export_rrblup
title: Export Dosage Matrix for rrBLUP — export_rrblup
text: Exports dosage matrix format expected rrBLUP::mixed.solve() rrBLUP::.mat(): numeric matrix samples rows markers columns, coded -1, 0, 1 (centered heterozygote).

title: Export Dosage Matrix for rrBLUP — export_rrblup
Export Dosage Matrix for rrBLUP — export_rrblup
text: dosage Numeric matrix. Dosage matrix (variants x samples) vcf2dosage(). file Character NULL. provided, writes CSV file.

title: Export Dosage Matrix for rrBLUP — export_rrblup
text: numeric matrix (samples x markers) coded -1, 0, 1. Returned invisibly file provided.

what: Export Dosage Matrix for sommer — export_sommer
title: Export Dosage Matrix for sommer — export_sommer
text: Exports dosage matrix use sommer::mmer(): numeric matrix samples rows markers columns. Optionally computes additive relationship matrix (= ZZ'/p).

title: Export Dosage Matrix for sommer — export_sommer
Export Dosage Matrix for sommer — export_sommer
text: dosage Numeric matrix. Dosage matrix (variants x samples). as_relationship Logical. TRUE, returns genomic relationship matrix instead raw dosage. Default FALSE. file Character NULL. provided, writes CSV file.

title: Export Dosage Matrix for sommer — export_sommer
text: numeric matrix (samples x markers), relationship matrix as_relationship = TRUE.

what: Extract Genotype Calls from VCF Data — extract_gt
title: Extract Genotype Calls from VCF Data — extract_gt
text: Extracts GT (genotype) field full genotype strings VCF object. Handles simple GT-formats complex multi-field formats (e.g. GT:DP:GQ).

title: Extract Genotype Calls from VCF Data — extract_gt
Extract Genotype Calls from VCF Data — extract_gt
text: vcf vcf_data object read_vcf().

title: Extract Genotype Calls from VCF Data — extract_gt
text: character matrix (variants x samples) containing GT field (e.g. "0/0", "0/1/1/1", "0|0|1|1").

what: Filter Variants by Minor Allele Frequency — filter_maf
title: Filter Variants by Minor Allele Frequency — filter_maf
text: Removes variants minor allele frequency threshold. Calculates MAF dosage matrix.

title: Filter Variants by Minor Allele Frequency — filter_maf
Filter Variants by Minor Allele Frequency — filter_maf
text: dosage Numeric matrix. Dosage matrix (variants x samples). maf Numeric. Minimum minor allele frequency. Default 0.05. ploidy Integer. Ploidy level MAF calculation. Default 2.

title: Filter Variants by Minor Allele Frequency — filter_maf
text: list dosage (filtered matrix), kept (logical vector), maf_values (numeric vector MAF per variant).

title: Filter Variants by Missingness — filter_missingness
text: Removes variants proportion missing genotypes exceeds threshold.

title: Filter Variants by Missingness — filter_missingness
Filter Variants by Missingness — filter_missingness
text: dosage Numeric matrix. Dosage matrix (variants x samples). max_missing Numeric. Maximum proportion missing genotypes per variant (0-1). Default 0.2 (20%).

title: Filter Variants by Missingness — filter_missingness
text: list dosage (filtered matrix), kept (logical vector), miss_rates (numeric vector missingness per variant).

title: Filter Samples by Missingness — filter_samples
text: Removes samples proportion missing genotypes exceeds threshold.

title: Filter Samples by Missingness — filter_samples
Filter Samples by Missingness — filter_samples
text: dosage Numeric matrix. Dosage matrix (variants x samples). max_missing Numeric. Maximum proportion missing genotypes per sample (0-1). Default 0.3 (30%).

title: Filter Samples by Missingness — filter_samples
text: list dosage (filtered matrix), kept (logical vector), miss_rates (numeric vector missingness per sample).

what: Convert Genotype Calls to Dosage Matrix — gt_to_dosage
title: Convert Genotype Calls to Dosage Matrix — gt_to_dosage
text: Converts character matrix VCF genotype calls (e.g. "0/0", "0/1", "1/1" diploids, "0/0/1/1" tetraploids) numeric dosage matrix counting number alternate alleles.

title: Convert Genotype Calls to Dosage Matrix — gt_to_dosage
Convert Genotype Calls to Dosage Matrix — gt_to_dosage
text: gt_matrix character matrix genotype calls (variants x samples), returned extract_gt(). missing_value Numeric. Value use missing genotypes. Default NA_real_.

title: Convert Genotype Calls to Dosage Matrix — gt_to_dosage
text: numeric matrix (variants x samples) alternate allele dosages. diploid: 0, 1, 2. tetraploid: 0, 1, 2, 3, 4.

title: Convert Genotype Calls to Dosage Matrix — gt_to_dosage
text: Handles phased (|) unphased (/) separators, missing genotypes (./., .), arbitrary ploidy levels.

title: Convert Genotype Calls to Dosage Matrix — gt_to_dosage
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ vcf <- read_vcf("genotypes.vcf.gz") gt <- extract_gt(vcf) dosage <- gt_to_dosage(gt) } # }

title: Read a VCF File — read_vcf

Read a VCF File — read_vcf
text: file Character. Path VCF file (.vcf .vcf.gz). n_max Integer Inf. Maximum number variants read. Default Inf (read ).

title: Read a VCF File — read_vcf
text: S3 object class "vcf_data" components: meta Character vector header lines (lines starting ##). fix Tibble fixed variant fields: CHROM, POS, ID, REF, ALT, QUAL, FILTER, INFO. gt Character matrix genotype fields (samples x variants transposing), FORMAT column parsed. samples Character vector sample names. format Character vector FORMAT field entries per variant. n_variants Integer. Number variants. n_samples Integer. Number samples.

what: vcf2dosage: Polyploid-Aware VCF to Dosage Matrix Conversion for Genomic Selection — vcf2dosage-package
title: vcf2dosage: Polyploid-Aware VCF to Dosage Matrix Conversion for Genomic Selection — vcf2dosage-package
text: Converts Variant Call Format (VCF) files numeric allele dosage matrices ready genomic selection genome-wide association studies. Handles diploid polyploid species (tetraploid, hexaploid, arbitrary ploidy), filters variants minor allele frequency, missingness, read depth, exports dosage matrices formats compatible 'rrBLUP', 'GWASpoly', 'BGLR', 'sommer', 'AGHmatrix'. Supports unphased (0/0/1/1) phased (0|0|1|1) genotype calls.

title: vcf2dosage: Polyploid-Aware VCF to Dosage Matrix Conversion for Genomic Selection — vcf2dosage-package
text: Maintainer: Joash Joshua Ayo joash.ayo@example.com

what: Convert a VCF File to a Dosage Matrix — vcf2dosage
title: Convert a VCF File to a Dosage Matrix — vcf2dosage
text: main entry point vcf2dosage. Reads VCF file, extracts genotype calls, converts dosage, filters MAF missingness, returns ready--use dosage matrix.

title: Convert a VCF File to a Dosage Matrix — vcf2dosage
code: vcf2dosage(   file,   ploidy = NULL,   min_maf = 0.05,   max_missing_variant = 0.2,   max_missing_sample = 0.5,   n_max = Inf )

title: Convert a VCF File to a Dosage Matrix — vcf2dosage
text: file Character. Path VCF file (.vcf .vcf.gz). ploidy Integer NULL. Expected ploidy level. NULL, auto-detected genotype calls. Default NULL. min_maf Numeric. Minimum minor allele frequency. Variants threshold removed. Default 0.05. max_missing_variant Numeric. Maximum proportion missing genotypes per variant (0-1). Default 0.2. max_missing_sample Numeric. Maximum proportion missing genotypes per sample (0-1). Default 0.5. n_max Integer Inf. Maximum number variants read. Default Inf.

title: Convert a VCF File to a Dosage Matrix — vcf2dosage
text: S3 object class "vcf2dosage_result" containing: dosage Numeric matrix (variants x samples) allele dosages. dosage_t Numeric matrix (samples x markers) — transposed, ready GS packages. map Tibble variant positions (marker, chrom, pos). samples Character vector retained sample names. ploidy Detected specified ploidy level. filter_summary Tibble summarizing many variants/samples removed step. vcf original parsed VCF data.

title: Convert a VCF File to a Dosage Matrix — vcf2dosage
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ result <- vcf2dosage("my_genotypes.vcf.gz", ploidy = 2) result  # Use with rrBLUP Z <- export_rrblup(result$dosage) # rrBLUP::mixed.solve(y = pheno, Z = Z)  # Tetraploid potato result <- vcf2dosage("potato.vcf.gz", ploidy = 4, min_maf = 0.01) } # }

title: vcf2dosage (development version)
text: read_vcf() reads VCF files using data.table::fread() speed. extract_gt() parses genotype fields complex FORMAT strings. gt_to_dosage() converts genotype calls numeric dosage ploidy. detect_ploidy() auto-detects ploidy genotype calls. filter_maf(), filter_missingness(), filter_samples() variant/sample QC. variant_summary() computes per-variant quality metrics. vcf2dosage() main wrapper: read, parse, filter, convert one call. Export functions rrBLUP, GWASpoly, BGLR, sommer, generic marker maps. create_example_vcf() generates test VCF files (diploid, tetraploid, mixed).
